case_title: RITA TONG VS. JOSHUA BERNSTEIN ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,240.00 FILED BY TONG, RITA AS TO DEFENDANT BERNSTEIN, JOSHUA ZHANG, MONIQUE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $0.00 SERVED SEP-16-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BERNSTEIN, JOSHUA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-20-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, MONIQUE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-24-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-24-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF RITA TONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS JOSUA BERNSTEIN AND MONIQUE ZHANG ARE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-06-2017 - CONTINUED (IN PART - TRIAL TO BE SET IN LATE FEBRUARY), PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-24-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. **NO FURTHER CONTINUANCES FOR DEFENDANTS**
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-24-2017 - JUDGMENT.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (FORWARDED TO DEPT. 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE) FILED BY DEFENDANT BERNSTEIN, JOSHUA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-06-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TONG, RITA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERNSTEIN, JOSHUA ZHANG, MONIQUE $2,240.00 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,420.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT ZHANG, MONIQUE
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED IN PART. TRIAL WILL BE SET IN LATE FEBRUARY. **NO FURTHER CONTINURANCES FOR DEFENDANT**
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BERNSTEIN, JOSHUA ZHANG, MONIQUE
